headline: Highway Toll Abolition Costs Government RM4.2 Billion
context: Government progressive toll abolition programme cost RM4.2 billion in compensation payments to highway concessionaires in 2025.

cards.big: Toll abolition cost RM4.2 billion in concessionaire compensation in 2025
cards.sub: Only 18 of 31 tolled highways made free after 5 years of the policy

cards.big: PLUS Highway toll collection of RM3.8 billion annually remains fully operational
cards.sub: Government says PLUS concession expiring 2038 too expensive to buy out early

cards.big: Average household saves RM180 monthly from abolished tolls on 18 highways
cards.sub: Savings concentrated in Klang Valley where 14 of 18 abolished toll roads are

cards.big: Remaining 13 tolled highways generate RM5.6 billion combined annual revenue
cards.sub: Full abolition would require estimated RM32 billion in total compensation

cards.big: Toll abolition tests whether public roads should generate private profit indefinitely
RM4.2 billion toll abolition redistributes cost from drivers to all taxpayers, including non-users.
